overall.description: A smooth first-person walkthrough of a neoclassical palace complex rendered in a game engine, beginning at the curved colonnade entrance, crossing the grand courtyard, and exiting into surrounding parkland during dramatic golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the curved colonnade entrance of a neoclassical palace

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the stone colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the imposing curved colonnade with tall stone columns and decorative urns

entered.detail: semicircular row of tall stone columns with decorative urns on the roofline
historic stone building facade with tall windows and classical detailing
ornamental stone urns lining the roof of the colonnade
green leafy trees visible beyond the palace structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a grand neoclassical palace colonnade ahead. The camera walks forward along a stone paved approach, passing between scattered trees on the left and the palace wing on the right, before entering the covered walkway beneath the curved colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open palace courtyard

events.description: exiting the colonnade into the vast open courtyard

agents.ego_description: passing through the columned walkway and emerging into the expansive central courtyard

entered.detail: large open paved area surrounded by the palace colonnades on all sides
the main palace building with symmetrical windows and classical architecture across the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the covered colonnade and emerges into a vast open courtyard. The entry colonnade falls behind as the view opens up to reveal the symmetrical palace facades surrounding the paved central area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palace courtyard surrounded by historic colonnades

agents.ego_description: crossing the expansive stone courtyard toward the west wing exit colonnade

entered.detail: the matching curved colonnade structure marking the west exit of the courtyard
the western palace facade with tall arched windows and stone detailing

segments.scene_description: The camera continues across the open courtyard, with the north facade shifting to the left as the west wing and exit colonnade approach. The stone pavement stretches across the empty plaza as the camera moves steadily toward the far side of the palace complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped park grounds beyond the palace

events.description: passing through the exit colonnade into the surrounding parkland
ground surface changes from stone pavement to gravel path

agents.ego_description: passing through the west colonnade and continuing along the gravel path into the wooded park area

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees lining the park path
curved walking path made of compacted gravel leading into the forest
dense tree line and woodland visible in the distance under dramatic clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the exit colonnade, leaving the palace architecture behind and entering a natural park setting. The ground transitions from stone to gravel as the path curves through trees, with a dense forest visible ahead under the dramatic golden hour sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the structured elegance of a neoclassical palace entrance into the wilder expanse of a surrounding parkland. It begins on a stone paved approach, passing between scattered trees and a palace wing before gliding beneath the shelter of a curved colonnade. As the camera emerges from the walkway, the view opens into a vast, symmetrical courtyard where the palace facades frame a wide, empty plaza. The scene then shifts as the camera traverses the stone pavement toward the far side of the complex, with the architecture gradually receding to the left. Finally, the camera passes through an exit colonnade and leaves the stone behind, transitioning onto a gravel path that curves through trees toward a dense forest under a dramatic golden hour sky.
